About the Name Liam

Is Liam a rare name? Based on global birth registries and census data, we estimate that 380,000 people currently hold this name, making it rank #15 globally. Want more insights? see similar names.

The name Liam appears frequently in our models, heavily influenced by historical naming trends and regional cultural shifts. If you're curious, compare this name.

Gender & Demographic Distribution

Liam is predominantly used as a male name. It has roots in Irish linguistic traditions. The meaning "Strong-willed warrior" reflects early cultural values.

Historical Popularity of Liam

The popularity of Liam has shifted over time. Below is a decade-by-decade breakdown of the name's relative usage.

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the origin of the name Liam?

Linguistic and cultural patterns suggest that Liam has Irish origins.

How does Liam rank globally?

According to our models, it ranks roughly #15 in worldwide popularity.

Is Liam outdated?

Naming trends are cyclical. While certain decades saw spikes in usage, Liam continues to be used by modern parents.
